properties.name: Burgess Park or St Thomas-a-Watering
properties.desc: St Thomas-a-Watering, where  the River Neckinger  flowed across the Old Kent Road, feeding the pond in Burgess Park, where the pilgrims watered their horses.

properties.name: St Alfege
properties.desc: Dedicated to an Archbishop of Canterbury murdered a century and a half before Becket

properties.name: End of Stage 1: Lesnes Abbey
properties.desc: Lesney was founded as an act of penance by Richard de Lucy, who supported Henry II in his pursuit of Thomas Becket
